hero.title: The Global Standard for
hero.description: The Agentic Commerce Framework® (ACF) is the definitive governance methodology for deploying, supervising, and controlling autonomous agentic systems in commercial environments.

principles.title: 4 Founding Principles
principles.subtitle: Four immutable axioms defining the boundary between human authority and autonomous agent execution.

principle1.title: Decision Sovereignty
principle1.description: Critical strategic decisions are never delegated to autonomous agents.

principle2.title: Governance by Design
principle2.description: Governance frameworks are defined before deployment, not after.

principle3.title: Ultimate Human Control
principle3.description: Every agentic system must preserve the ability for human intervention.

principle4.title: Traceable Accountability
principle4.description: Every autonomous action must be auditable and attributable.

layers.title: 4 Operational Layers
layers.subtitle: A hierarchical architecture from strategic governance to real-time execution supervision.

layer1.title: Governance & Sovereignty
layer1.description: Sovereignty charter, governance committee, RACI matrix, non-delegable zone map.

layer2.title: Decision Policy
layer2.description: Weighted objectives, arbitration rules, escalation thresholds, regulatory constraints.

layer3.title: Agent System
layer3.description: Explicit mandate per agent, interaction perimeter, autonomy level, 5-category taxonomy.

layer4.title: Execution & Supervision
layer4.description: Adaptive gating matrix, multi-level alerts, 18 sovereignty KPIs, live dashboards.

maturity.title: 4 Agentic Maturity Levels
maturity.subtitle: ACF classifies systems by autonomy level. Level 2 is the recommended deployment target.

level0.name: Classical Automation
level0.description: Fixed rules, no ML. Human intervention for any modification.

level1.name: Assisted Agents
level1.description: Agents analyze and recommend. Every final decision remains with a human.

level2.name: Governed Agents
level2.description: Agents decide within strict governance. Non-delegable zones locked.

level3.name: Supervised Autonomous
level3.description: Agents decide and learn. Maximum governance. For mature organizations only.

modules.title: 8 Implementation Modules
modules.subtitle: A sequential path deployed progressively over 6–18 months. Each module builds on the previous.

module1.name: Sovereignty Diagnostic
module1.description: Sovereignty Score calculation. Risk zone mapping.

module5.name: Security & Reversibility
module5.description: Sandboxing, reversibility plan. Kill switch design.

video.title:
Governance Cannot Wait.
Agents Already Decide.
video.description1: In 2026, autonomous agents are already executing decisions in commercial environments — setting prices, qualifying leads, processing claims, managing contracts. Most organizations have no framework to govern them.
video.description2: ACF was created to fill that void — before a governance failure becomes a legal, financial, or reputational crisis.

quote.text: The question is no longer whether to deploy agents. It is how to deploy them without surrendering your sovereignty.
quote.author: — Vincent DORANGE, Creator of the ACF Standard

article1.title: How the EU AI Act Applies to Agentic Systems in 2026
article1.excerpt: The AI Act's risk-based approach creates specific obligations for autonomous agents. Here's what ACF Level 2 governance covers.

article2.title: The DDA: Why Every AI-Native Company Needs a Delegated Decision Agent Officer
article2.excerpt: The DDA is the legal guardian of your autonomous agents. How to create and empower this critical role.

article3.title: Designing a Three-Level Kill Switch for Autonomous Agent Systems
article3.excerpt: An effective kill switch is not a single button. ACF specifies three interrupt levels with defined response times.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For any questions regarding these legal notices, you may contact us through the Contact page of the site or by mail to the registered office address.

objet.title: Purpose
objet.text: These General Terms of Use (GTU) define the terms and conditions of access and use of the site acfstandard.vercel.app and its associated services, including the ACF Score® diagnostic and information relating to the Agentic Commerce Framework®.

acces.title: Access to the Site
acces.text: Access to the site is free. The ACF Score® diagnostic is available without registration and free of charge. Certain premium services (ACF Control, Certification, Support) may be subject to specific conditions and pricing communicated at the time of subscription.

score.title: Use of the ACF Score®
score.text: The ACF Score® is an indicative diagnostic tool. It does not constitute a regulatory audit, official certification, or legal advice. The results and recommendations provided are for informational purposes only and cannot engage the liability of AI CONSULTING. The user is solely responsible for the interpretation and implementation of the recommendations.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.text: The ACF® methodology, scoring algorithms, 4-layer framework structure, and all associated deliverables are protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized commercial use is strictly prohibited.

responsabilite.title: Liability
responsabilite.text: AI CONSULTING endeavors to provide accurate and up-to-date information. However, AI CONSULTING does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of information published on the site. AI CONSULTING shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the site or the inability to access it.

modification.title: Modification of Terms
modification.text: AI CONSULTING reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Modifications will take effect upon their publication on the site. Continued use of the site after publication constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

responsable.title: Data Controller
responsable.text: The data controller for personal data is AI CONSULTING, SASU, 38 Bis Boulevard Victor Hugo, 06000 Nice, France. Contact: via the Contact page of the website.

donnees.title: Data Collected
donnees.text: For the ACF Score® diagnostic: responses to questionnaire questions are processed in real time to calculate your score and are not stored without your explicit consent. If you provide your email address, it is used solely for sending your PDF report and, with your consent, for communications related to the ACF®.

formulaire.title: Contact Form
formulaire.text: Information entered in the contact form (name, email, company, message) is used exclusively to respond to your request. It is neither resold nor shared with third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: The site uses technical cookies necessary for its operation. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used. Analytics cookies (if enabled) are anonymized and used solely to improve user experience.

hebergement.title: Data Hosting
hebergement.text: Data is hosted by Vercel Inc. (United States) under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. Vercel complies with applicable data protection standards.

rgpd.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rgpd.text: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, data portability, and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us via the Contact page. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority).

conservation.title: Data Retention
conservation.text: Personal data is retained for the period strictly necessary for the purposes for which it is processed. Contact form data is retained for a maximum of 12 months. Diagnostic data is not retained without explicit consent.

definition.title: What is a cookie?
definition.text: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember information about your visit.

utilises.title: Cookies Used
utilises.text: The site exclusively uses essential technical cookies for the site's operation (session management, language preferences, display). These cookies do not require your prior consent as they are strictly necessary for the provision of the service.

analytiques.title: Analytics Cookies
analytiques.text: If analytics tools are implemented, they will use anonymized data and will not allow you to be personally identified. You will be informed and your consent will be obtained before activation of these cookies.

tiers.title: Third-Party Cookies
tiers.text: The site does not use any advertising cookies or social media cookies. No data is shared with advertising platforms.

gestion.title: Cookie Management
gestion.text: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect your browsing experience.

standard.heroSubtitle: Governing decisions in the age of autonomous systems.
standard.shiftLine1: Artificial intelligence is no longer just a tool.
standard.shiftP1: Across industries, autonomous agents are now executing operational decisions in real time — pricing adjustments, procurement orders, customer engagement, logistics routing, risk assessments.
standard.shiftP2Pre: These decisions happen continuously, at machine speed. And in most organizations,
standard.shiftP2Bold: no governance architecture exists to supervise them.
standard.shiftP3Pre: The result is a new category of risk:
standard.shiftP4: The Agentic Commerce Framework® was created to solve this problem.
standard.statementLine1: Autonomous systems do not create chaos.
standard.stat1Label: of organizations have no formal AI governance
standard.stat2Label: maximum AI Act sanctions or 7% global revenue
standard.stat3Label: lower correction costs with structured governance
standard.stat4Label: Level 1 kill switch response time (ACF spec)
standard.gapTitle: Organizations spent the last decade adopting AI. Governance models never evolved.
standard.gapP1: Traditional governance assumes a simple structure: humans decide, systems execute.
standard.gapP2Pre: Agentic systems invert this relationship. Machines now execute
standard.gapP3: When this shift occurs without structured governance, organizations lose visibility and control over their own operational decisions. The consequences are not theoretical:
standard.gapRisk4: Regulatory exposure under emerging AI regulation
standard.frameworkTitle: The first governance architecture for autonomous decision systems.
standard.frameworkP1Pre: The Agentic Commerce Framework® does not control AI models. It governs the
standard.frameworkItem5: Preserve human sovereignty over critical actions
standard.frameworkClosing: ACF creates a structured decision governance layer between human leadership and machine execution.
standard.archSubtitle: Together they create a continuous control system for autonomous operations.
standard.layer1Text: The governance layer establishes decision sovereignty. Organizations define who retains final authority, which decisions can be delegated, which remain exclusively human. At this level, companies formalize their Agentic Constitution — the foundational document establishing the principles of AI governance.
standard.layer2Sub: What agents are allowed to do
standard.layer2Text: Policy defines the behavioral boundaries of autonomous systems. It translates governance principles into operational rules — financial thresholds, time-based constraints, ethical limits, sector-specific regulatory policies. Policies ensure that agents operate within clearly defined decision boundaries.
standard.layer3Text: The system layer governs the technical execution environment. Every autonomous action remains observable, interruptible and auditable — through decision traceability, multi-agent coordination, and layered kill-switch mechanisms. The objective is not to slow agents down. It is to ensure they remain governable at machine speed.
standard.layer4Text: Governance is not a one-time configuration. It is an ongoing operational discipline. The supervision layer introduces continuous monitoring, incident response and governance reviews. Supervision ensures that agent systems evolve without eroding control.
standard.centralP: Without governance, autonomous systems create opacity. With governance, they become scalable instruments of strategic control.
standard.loopP: Governance is not configuration. It is a continuous operational loop — define, constrain, execute, monitor, intervene, improve. Then loop again.
standard.ecoSubtitle: Five integrated tools. One closed-loop system. Diagnose → Train → Monitor → Certify → Scale.
standard.ecoScoreDesc: Rapid diagnostic measuring decision sovereignty and governance maturity.
standard.ecoControlDesc: Real-time platform for supervising autonomous systems.
standard.ecoAcademyDesc: Training for executives and operators governing autonomous systems.
standard.ecoCertDesc: ACF TRUST™ and ACF CERTIFIED labels validating governance maturity.
standard.questionP1: The transition to autonomous systems is not a technology shift. It is a governance shift.
standard.questionP2: Organizations must evolve from managing software to governing decision systems.
standard.questionP3: The Agentic Commerce Framework® provides the structure required to do so.
standard.questionIntro:
Because in the age of autonomous systems,
the most important question is no longer:

acfControl.heroDescPost: for organizations deploying autonomous AI agents. Detect drift, classify incidents, intervene instantly.
acfControl.dashKillActivated: ⚠ KILL SWITCH ACTIVATED — All agents suspended
acfControl.dashDegradedMode: Degraded mode active — human takeover required
acfControl.dashHumanTakeover: Human takeover active. Awaiting manual review.
acfControl.dashSovereigntyBreach: Sovereignty breach detected. Immediate intervention required.
acfControl.posDescPost: — the nervous system your organization needs to remain sovereign.
acfControl.posNot1: An AI tool or agent builder
acfControl.posNot5: A data warehouse or BI tool
acfControl.modSubtitle: Each module serves one purpose: keeping humans in command of machine decisions.
acfControl.mod00Sub: Your governance baseline — scored 0 to 100 across 4 axes.
acfControl.mod01Sub: A living inventory: who decides what, with what, and how.
acfControl.mod03Sub: Strategic governance document — versioned, signed, auditable.
acfControl.mod04Sub: Every agent documented: mandate, scope, limits, human owner.
acfControl.mod05Sub: 5 KPIs per agent. Thresholds. Alerts. 30-day history.
acfControl.driftP1Pre: Catastrophic AI failures don't come from bugs — they come from
acfControl.driftP1Post: . The margin that slips from 32% → 28% without anyone noticing. Escalations that become "normal."
acfControl.driftP2Mid: for every agent KPI. It triggers alerts
acfControl.driftRecommendationAction: → Recommendation: review threshold or reduce scope.
acfControl.killDescPre: ACF Control doesn't just alert — it gives you the power to
acfControl.killGlobalDesc: Suspend ALL autonomous agents. Full degraded mode within 60 seconds.
acfControl.killArmed: ⚠ KILL SWITCH ARMED — Click to disarm
acfControl.killArmedInfo: All agents will be suspended upon confirmation. Action logged.
acfControl.dashOpsDesc: Deep-dive into each agent's performance. Adjust rules, manage drift thresholds, resolve incidents.
acfControl.dashConsultantDesc: Multi-client access, benchmarks, mission templates and audit-ready exports. Deliver a full ACF diagnostic in under 2 hours.
acfControl.riskDescPre: The cost of ACF Control is
acfControl.riskDescPost: compared to the financial, regulatory, and reputational risks you're taking without formalized governance.
acfControl.riskAiActDescPost: or 7% of global annual turnover for non-compliance with transparency and supervision requirements for high-risk AI systems.
acfControl.riskGdprDescPost: or 4% of global annual turnover. Ungoverned automated decisions multiply the risk of data violations.
acfControl.riskDriftDescPost: : pricing errors, broken inventory, abusive customer exclusions, invisible margin erosion.
acfControl.riskFraction: A fraction of your risk exposure
acfControl.riskStat1: of companies use AI agents without formalized governance
acfControl.riskStat2: of executives fear losing strategic control over their agents
acfControl.riskStat3: incidents increase 12x faster in organizations without supervision
acfControl.planDesc: Every organization has unique sovereignty challenges. We tailor ACF Control to your agent architecture, industry, and regulatory requirements.
acfControl.partnerDesc: Annual consultant license. ACF certification required for client access.
acfControl.ctaDescPre: Your agents are already making decisions. The only question is:
acfControl.footerRights: Agentic Commerce Framework® — All rights reserved.

acfPartners.heroParagraph1Bold: Strategic partners who share the mission.
acfPartners.heroParagraph2: ACF Partners deploy, audit, train, and certify organizations worldwide.
acfPartners.advantagesParagraph1: You don't just distribute a product. You
acfPartners.advantagesParagraph2: . That comes with territory, tools, revenue, and authority.
acfPartners.advTerritoryDesc: Secure your geographical zone. One region, one partner. No competition — only collaboration.
acfPartners.advRevenueDesc: Commission on every ACF Score, Control license, and certification deployed through your network.
acfPartners.advAcademyDesc: Full access to ACF Academy training modules. Train your team, then train your clients.
acfPartners.advCoBrandDesc: Use the ACF Partner badge. Your brand, backed by the global governance standard.
acfPartners.advDashboardDesc: Real-time data on deployments, certifications, revenue. Full visibility on your portfolio.
acfPartners.advSupportDesc: Direct access to ACF team. Dedicated onboarding, quarterly reviews, and escalation path.
acfPartners.tiersParagraph: Three levels of partnership. Each unlocks deeper access, more territory, and greater authority.
acfPartners.tierAffiliateDesc: Entry-level partnership. You recommend and refer.
acfPartners.tierCertifiedDesc: You deploy, train, and audit ACF governance.
acfPartners.portalParagraph: Access your dashboard, training materials, deployment data, certifications, and revenue reports.
acfPartners.portalAccessDesc: Sign in with your partner credentials
acfPartners.applyParagraph1: We select partners carefully. We're looking for organizations that share our vision:
acfPartners.applyWhyPartner: Why do you want to become an ACF Partner?
acfPartners.applyWhyPlaceholder: Tell us about your organization, your experience with AI governance, and what motivates you to deploy the ACF standard in your territory...
acfPartners.applyCheckbox: I agree to the ACF Partner Program Terms & Conditions and acknowledge that my application will be reviewed within 5 business days.
acfPartners.applySuccessParagraph1: Thank you for your interest in the ACF Partner Network. Our team will review your application and get back to you within
acfPartners.applySuccessStep1: Application confirmation sent to your email
acfPartners.ctaParagraph: Whether you're a consultancy, a tech firm, or an enterprise — if you believe in accountable autonomy, there's a place for you.
acfPartners.footerDesc: ACF Partners deploy, audit, and certify the governance standard worldwide. Join the network. Scale the trust.
acfPartners.footerCopyright: © 2026 Agentic Commerce Framework® — Vincent DORANGE. All rights reserved.

acfCertification.heroSubDesc: ACF is not an AI tool. It is a governance standard.
acfCertification.trustDesc: The public label for agentic governance. It signals to customers, partners, and regulators that your company operates autonomous systems under explicit governance. Not just automation.
acfCertification.trustLevel1Desc: You have started your agentic journey.
acfCertification.trustLevel2Desc: You operate agents under formal supervision.
acfCertification.trustLevel3Desc: Agentic governance is embedded in your organization.
acfCertification.trustFootnote: Annual audit required to maintain certification. Certified organizations display the ACF TRUST™ badge on their digital touchpoints.
acfCertification.guaranteesSubtitle: When you see the ACF TRUST™ badge, you know:
acfCertification.certifiedDesc: Professional certification for practitioners and partners who implement agentic governance in the field. You don't certify AI skills. You certify
acfCertification.certifiedDescBold: the capacity to govern autonomous systems.
acfCertification.certifiedPartnerDesc: For major firms and system integrators.
acfCertification.academyDesc: ACF Academy doesn't train people to use AI.
acfCertification.academyDescBold: It trains them to govern autonomous systems.
acfCertification.academy101Outcome: You can read an agentic organization.
acfCertification.academy102Outcome: You can deploy a Level 2 governed agent.
acfCertification.academy103Outcome: You can govern a living autonomous system.
acfCertification.academy201Outcome: You can deliver ACF for clients.
acfCertification.execDesc: 2 intensive days. Not a course — a transformation. Leaders leave with a signed Agentic Constitution, a 90-day governance roadmap, and the clarity to own their autonomous future.
acfCertification.execNote: No certification here. Just one thing: they leave responsible.
acfCertification.ecosystemDesc: Every piece feeds the next. A system, not a product.
acfCertification.ecosystemStep02Desc: Train teams to govern autonomous systems
acfCertification.ecosystemStep03Desc: Governance platform — operate in real time
acfCertification.ecosystemStep04Desc: Public label — prove it to customers
acfCertification.whyWithoutGovernanceDesc: Autonomy amplifies errors. Agents optimize locally, destroy value globally. No audit trail. No accountability. No way back.
acfCertification.whyWithAcfDesc: Autonomy amplifies clarity. Decisions are governed. Humans are in command. Every action is traceable, reversible, accountable.
acfCertification.whyBottomLine: You don't need more AI. You need
acfCertification.ctaDesc: Whether you're an enterprise proving governance or a consultant building the future of agentic commerce — there's a path for you.
acfCertification.footerDesc: ACF Certification & Academy is the governance pathway of the Agentic Commerce Framework. Certify trust. Train leaders. Build accountability.
acfCertification.footerCopyright: © 2026 Agentic Commerce Framework® — Vincent DORANGE. All rights reserved.

help.sovereigntyScoreDesc: Composite 0-100: governance ratio + human coverage + agent health + incident penalty.
help.killSwitchGuideDesc: L1 Pause <1s. L2 Contain <5s. L3 Kill <30s.
help.connectorsGuideDesc: OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Cohere, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, Bedrock, Vertex, Azure, HuggingFace, Zapier, Make, n8n, Salesforce, Replicate, Webhook, REST, WebSocket, MQTT.
